Entry.EnglishText: What's the meaning of this, Zelos?!

Entry.JapaneseText: 何度も同じ事言わせないで欲しいね。 俺さまは世界樹を破壊する為に ここまで来たんだよ
Entry.EnglishText: How many times are you gonna want me to repeat the same thing? I came all this way to destroy the World Tree.

Entry.JapaneseText: なんで……なんでそんな事を！？
Entry.EnglishText: Why...? Why would you do something like that?!

Entry.JapaneseText: 世界樹はマナを生み出す大切な存在なんだぞ！ 壊れてなくなったりしたら それこそ世界は終わっちまう！
Entry.EnglishText: The World Tree is a precious existence that creates life! If it's destroyed, it would be over for the whole world!

Entry.JapaneseText: 知ってるよ、そんな事。 だけど、俺さまには関係ないね。 世界がどうなろうとさ
Entry.EnglishText: I know all that stuff. But that doesn't mean a thing to me. Whatever happens to the world and all.

Entry.JapaneseText: しつこいね。 俺さまはいつだって本気だよ
Entry.EnglishText: You're so persistent. I'm always serious.

Entry.JapaneseText: これ以上話しても意味ないだろ。 じゃあね、もう行かせてもらうよ
Entry.EnglishText: There's no point in talking about this anymore. See ya. I'll be going now.

Entry.JapaneseText: 待て！ 行かせるわけにいくか！
Entry.EnglishText: Wait! I'm not letting you get away!
